Container.Name: Windrose
Container.Overview:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install a Windrose server and run it.
**ATTENTION:** First startup can take a long time since it downloads the server files and installs the runtimes!
**NOTE:** After first startup of the server, shut it down and edit the following files to your liking: - YOUR_INSTALL_PATH/R5/ServerDescription.json - YOUR_INSTALL_PATH/R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/_gameVersion_/Worlds/_worldId_/WorldDescription.json The invite code used to join the server will be in ServerDescription.json
Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

Config.Name: Game ID
Config.Description: The game ID that the container download at startup. (https://steamdb.info/)

Config.Name: Validate Installation
Config.Description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.
